list.name: user_id
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT email AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM users WHERE status = 'approved' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY email

targets.rawSql: SELECT u.email, u.status, u.is_admin, u.created_at, p.username_slug, p.profile_public FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles p ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = '$user_id'::uuid
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tailorings WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid

panels.title: Tailorings This Month

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM llm_usage_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND event_type IN ('tailoring_create', 'tailoring_regen') AND created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW())

panels.description: tailoring_create + tailoring_regen this calendar month. Thresholds are illustrative — update when billing tiers ship.

panels.title: LLM Events Last Hour (Burst)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM llm_usage_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND event_type IN ('tailoring_create', 'tailoring_regen', 'letter_regen') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

panels.description: Hourly burst meter (create + regen + letter_regen). Rate limit fires at 10.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM experience_claims WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tailorings WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND (letter_public OR posting_public)
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS value FROM user_integrations WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND provider = 'notion'

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS tailoring_create FROM llm_usage_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND event_type = 'tailoring_create' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS tailoring_regen FROM llm_usage_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND event_type = 'tailoring_regen' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS letter_regen FROM llm_usage_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND event_type = 'letter_regen' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS resume_process FROM llm_usage_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND event_type = 'resume_process' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT source_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM experience_claims WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND status = 'active' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT source_type, connection_status, sync_status, last_synced_at, last_requested_at, error_message FROM experience_sources WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid ORDER BY source_type

SELECT t.id, j.extracted_job->>'title' AS job_title, j.extracted_job->>'company' AS company, t.generation_status, t.letter_public OR t.posting_public AS shared, t.created_at FROM tailorings t JOIN jobs j ON j.id = t.job_id WHERE t.user_id = '$user_id'::uuid ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(
    CASE model
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4-mini' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 0.75  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.08  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 4.50  / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 2.50  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.25  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 15.00 / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'text-embedding-3-small' THEN
        COALESCE(input_tokens,0)                                        * 0.025 / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 6) AS value
FROM llm_call_logs
WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid
  AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM llm_call_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND call_type = 'llm' AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM llm_call_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND call_type = 'embedding' AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(cached_tokens) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens), 0), 1) AS value FROM llm_call_logs WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid AND call_type = 'llm' AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT
  prompt_name,
  model,
  call_type,
  COUNT(*)                    AS calls,
  SUM(input_tokens)           AS input_tokens,
  SUM(cached_tokens)          AS cached_tokens,
  SUM(output_tokens)          AS output_tokens,
  ROUND(SUM(
    CASE model
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4-mini' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 0.75  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.08  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 4.50  / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 2.50  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.25  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 15.00 / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'text-embedding-3-small' THEN
        COALESCE(input_tokens,0)                                        * 0.025 / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 8) AS cost_usd
FROM llm_call_logs
WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid
  AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY prompt_name, model, call_type
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT
  created_at,
  prompt_name,
  model,
  call_type,
  input_tokens,
  cached_tokens,
  output_tokens,
  ROUND(
    CASE model
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4-mini' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 0.75  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.08  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 4.50  / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 2.50  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.25  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 15.00 / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'text-embedding-3-small' THEN
        COALESCE(input_tokens,0)                                        * 0.025 / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  , 8) AS cost_usd
FROM llm_call_logs
WHERE user_id = '$user_id'::uuid
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50
